name: BT Catalog
changelog: Navy-first default colorway now works for SanMar and EG-PRO too. Since those suppliers carry no hex (only S&S does), the rule now also recognizes dark-blue and gray by color NAME (navy, royal, cobalt, indigo, midnight, marine; charcoal/graphite/slate/oxford), so a style with no literal 'navy' still defaults to a dark/neutral color like it does for S&S.
